monitors.name: test-watcher
monitors.description: Run vitest in watch mode and stream pass/fail to the session. Auto-starts when tdd-feature-build skill activates. Skipped if no `test:watch` script in package.json.
monitors._note: Each stdout line becomes an in-session notification. To suppress per-project, add `"monitors": false` to .claude-tdd-pro/config.json or remove this entry.

_doc: Monitors are background processes whose output is streamed into the session. Pattern from claude-code spec late 2026. Optional and conservative by default — only the test-watcher above, gated on skill invocation.
